content.en:
"The Realm of Ice and Fire has been destroyed!"

Ye Tian looked at all this, he couldn't stop it at all, but he didn't have any mercy, the creatures of the Ice Flame Realm had nothing to do with him.

Of course, not all living beings were killed, and some of the native third realms still protected some of their clansmen.

As long as they are not the Holy Sea Realm Lords and have nothing to do with the Holy Sea Realm Lords, those Fourth Realms will not kill them.

In the blink of an eye, the vast Ice Flame Realm turned into nothingness, and a large number of weak creatures under the protection of the Third Realm and a very small number of Third Realm stood in the Death Void.

At this time, those native third realms were still very panicked and worried, for fear that the fourth realms would wipe him out.

Swish!!!!!

The eyes of these Fourth Realms were locked on these Third Realms and those tribesmen who were blessed by the Third Realm, and any of these cultivators could be the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

At this time.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord who was hiding in the extradimensional realm in Ye Tian's copy body was very panicked, for fear of being discovered by these Fourth Realms.

He didn't dare to communicate with Ye Tian, for fear of causing a slight fluctuation.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's other complex 07 body quickly escaped with the False Ka Ye Wisdom Body Inheritance, and even burned the origin.

For the sake of truthfulness, the Holy Sea Realm Lord also gave Ye Tian many super-level super-dimensional Dao soldiers on his body, so that this replica body could be refined.

Ye Tian's move attracted those Fourth Realms, and these Fourth Realms immediately locked Ye Tian's copy body, and the invisible force blocked this place and suppressed Ye Tian's coming.

In an instant, he couldn't move.

Whoa!!!

These Fourth Realms descended on Ye Tian's side, and their will penetrated into the extradimensional realm in Ye Tian's body, and they sensed the inheritance of the false Ka Ye wisdom body that was sealed by the Great Realm Armor Technique.

The strength of these Fourth Realms was too strong, and even the seal of the Great Realm Armor Technique was infiltrated by them a little, as if they sensed a wisp of breath inherited by the wisdom body of the Jiaye.

"You are the Lord of the Holy Sea Realm?"

These Fourth Realms were shocked.

This disguise is too powerful!

Of course, they also spied on other extra-dimensional realms, and there were no problems, even Ye Tian's duplicate body was hidden deeper, and they naturally didn't find any problems.

"There is no problem with the other extradimensional realms, let them leave!"

These Fourth Realm Paths.

Immediately, they grabbed Ye's replica body bait.

They could also see that the mystery of the near-third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique was so deep that if it was forcibly broken, it would easily damage the inheritance, so they had to be careful.

In fact, they were also very surprised, they never expected that the Holy Sea Realm Lord would actually practice the Great Realm Armor Technique?

It stands to reason that only the Tianjia clan can cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, unless the Holy Sea Realm Lord has the talent of the Tianjia clan.

Moreover, the talent of the Holy Sea Realm Lord was too high, and he cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique to the level of almost the third layer.

That's right, Ye Tian deliberately only showed his attainments that were close to the third layer.

Otherwise, it would be strange to reveal the true third-layer realm of the Great Realm Armor Technique, because the extra-dimensional realms of the fourth realm would not be able to deduce the traces of the third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique at all, if it was close to the third layer, it would be possible.

Really.

These Fourth Realm Masters suddenly realized that if the Holy Sea Realm Lord cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique to a level close to the third layer, it would be normal for it to be so difficult to deduce.

Therefore, they decided that the third realm of this disguise was the Lord of the Holy Sea Realm. 、

As for why cultivation is in the middle of the third realm, it may still be just a disguise, but they can't see through it.

......

The copy body was caught, and Ye Tian did not panic at all.

Whew!!

A third realm left here, unhindered by the fourth realm.

And Ye Tian also successfully left with the Holy Sea Realm Lord, away from here.

After a long time, the Holy Sea Realm Lord dared to contact Ye Tian.

"Are we out of trouble?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord asked.

"I'm out of trouble, but I sacrificed a clone!" Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Your Excellency!" the Holy Sea Realm Lord thanked.

And as the partnership ended, so did the vows between them.

"Your Excellency, can you take me out of this realm and go to the Kunlin River in the 5171st Realm, where the deduction of the Fourth Realm will be distorted, and once you enter there, the Fourth Realm will not be able to deduce my traces. "

The Holy Sea Realm Lord asked.

"Good!"

He then headed for the Kunlin River.

Time passed slowly, and after a period of time, Ye Tian arrived at the Kunlin River.

......

Kunlin River.

Ye Tian came here and released the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord breathed a sigh of relief, after arriving here, he could be considered truly safe, at least for a short time, he didn't have to worry about the threat of the Fourth Realm.

He took a look at Ye Tian, and had the idea of killing Ye Tian in his heart, if Ye Tian fell, then the inheritance of the wisdom body of Jiaye still belonged to him.

But he held back.

It's not that he doesn't want to kill Ye Tian, he really doesn't dare to bet.

In case Ye Tian's body is still a special clone, its body is still in other places, killing his clone, Ye Tian will definitely reveal his location, and he will still be hunted down by the Fourth Realm at that time.

Therefore, he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian.

But at this moment.

Ye Tian muttered, "Holy Sea Realm Lord, to be honest, if it weren't for the causal relationship between me and you, I wouldn't have really made a move on you. "

"What do you mean?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord said coldly.

"It's not interesting, it's just that I don't want you to live!"

Ye Tian smiled.

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian's replica body was directly annihilated.

Before annihilation, his voice filled the void around him.

"The Holy Sea Realm Lord is here!"

This was just one of the 993 methods, and he used other replica bodies to relay the message before he reached the Kunlin River.

Therefore, those Fourth Realms would definitely come to kill the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

......

"Damn, this is not the Holy Sea Realm Lord, it is likely to be one of his clones!"

After witnessing Ye Tian's copy body annihilating itself, a Fourth Realm said angrily.

Committing suicide so decisively, isn't it a doppelganger?

Just when they were disappointed, a piece of news came, and it was the trace of the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

"Kunlin River, the Holy Sea Realm Lord can really run, go to Kunlin River immediately!"

Whew!!!

These Fourth Realms immediately rushed to the Kunlin River.

On the other side of the Kunlin River, the Holy Sea Realm Lord has been discovered by the other Third Realms, and more and more Third Realms are besieging them.

Soon.

When the Fourth Realm arrived here, they easily captured the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

Facing the threat of the Fourth Realm, this Holy Sea Realm Lord immediately revealed Ye Tian's information.

But from beginning to end, Ye Tian did not reveal his identity, so the Holy Sea Realm Lord couldn't say any useful information at all.

Moreover, the Holy Sea Realm Lord has not cultivated the first layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body, so he will not be able to pass on this inheritance.

"Rubbish!"

A fourth realm directly wiped out the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and then tracked Ye Tian, but Ye Tian only exposed the identities of the other third realms, and in the end, he also found the other third realms, and it was impossible to suspect him.
